report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1 v8: Stable since v7 — no new commits. 41 uncommitted files (up from 29), including 9 learn page edits, 2 new OG SVGs, and stablecoin-yield-tracker update. 141 TS errors holding. 628 published slugs, 1,240 pages on disk. All 6 API routes intact.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28 — no new commits since last cycle.
1,240 page.tsx files on disk — STABLE.
628 published slugs (up 2 from v7's 626 — uncommitted published-pages.ts edit adds 2 slugs).
141 TypeScript errors — STABLE. All in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors: true).

9 learn pages modified in working tree (appchains, crypto-index-funds, crypto-passive-income, verkle-trees, institutional-adoption, omnichain-defi, solana-token-extensions, stablecoin-payments, unichain) — all clean server components with metadata exports.
1 tool page modified: stablecoin-yield-tracker/page.tsx — needs review before commit.
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx — unchanged. Scaffolding sprint still needed.
Network egress blocked — live HTTP checks unavailable from sandbox.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields.
No API route code changes this cycle. Caching and fallback patterns unchanged.
market-dominance is the only route with explicit CACHE_TTL (300s) and FALLBACK_DATA — other routes use simpler patterns.
defi-yields still lacks stale fallback data — persistent low-priority gap.
13 total API routes on disk (core 6 + cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, admin, standup-email, subscribe).
Egress blocked — cannot verify live API responses or upstream CoinGecko/DefiLlama health.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD: 3b2dd28 — unchanged since last cycle. No new deploys triggered.
41 uncommitted files (up from 29 in v7). Delta: +9 learn page edits, +2 OG SVGs, +1 tool page edit, +2 skill files, new report files.
Build fix from 3b2dd28 ('use client' removal) should be live if Vercel auto-deploy on push is enabled.
Production build expected to succeed — 141 TS errors non-blocking.
Growing uncommitted file count (41) increases risk of merge conflicts. Recommend commit+push cycle soon.
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard — egress blocked.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: NO NEW COMMITS this cycle — steady-state. All changes are local uncommitted edits.
ACTIVE WORK IN PROGRESS: 9 learn guide edits + stablecoin-yield-tracker update + 2 new OG SVGs.
CARRY-OVER: 41 uncommitted files need commit+push. Growing since v7 (was 29). Priority: high.
CARRY-OVER: 109 published slugs without page.tsx — needs scaffolding sprint.
CARRY-OVER: defi-yields fallback data gap — low priority.
ACTION NEEDED: Commit+push the 41 uncommitted files to trigger Vercel deploy and reduce drift risk.
NO BLOCKERS requiring Jefe's immediate attention.
